exploration_notes: Found 12 files referencing RecordAccumulator via local grep and Sourcegraph search. The class is defined in RecordAccumulator.java with 6 inner types (PartitionerConfig, RecordAppendResult, AppendCallbacks, ReadyCheckResult, TopicInfo, NodeLatencyStats). Direct code usages are in KafkaProducer.java (import+field+constructor+inner type refs), Sender.java (field+constructor+inner type ref), and 4 test files + 1 benchmark. Comment-only references exist in Node.java, BuiltInPartitioner.java, and Pro
